data.label: Incident Report
data.description:
A single public safety incident recorded by Cordova National Police.
Business Context: Links to Civil Registry for person identification
Purpose: Document an incident with location, category, involved parties, and outcome

items.label: Incident Report Number
items.description: A report number for an incident (NIEM j:IncidentReportNumber)

items.label: Incident Summary
items.description: Brief summary of incident (one paragraph)

items.label: Location Street Full Text
items.description: A complete street address (NIEM nc:LocationStreetFullText). BFO alignment: address is an information content entity (IAO:0000030) referring to a site (BFO:0000029).

items.label: City
items.description: One of the nine cities in the Republic of Cordova.

items.label: Incident Status
items.description: Current status of the incident

items.label: Province
items.description: One of the three provinces of the Republic of Cordova. Used across civil registry, property, tax, and all geographic records.

items.label: Incident Category Code
items.description: Categories of incidents per NIEM j:IncidentCategoryCode

items.label: Incident Date
items.description: A date and time an incident occurred (NIEM j:IncidentDate). BFO alignment: incident is a process (BFO:0000015) occurring at a temporal region.

items.label: Charge and Disposition
items.description:
Charges filed and case outcome. Cordova has misdemeanor-level offenses only.
Purpose: Record charges and their disposition
Parent Cluster: Incident Report

items.label: Charge Description
items.description: A description of a charge (NIEM j:ChargeDescriptionText)

items.label: Charge Category (Cordova)
items.description: Categories of misdemeanor offenses in Cordova law enforcement records. Cordova has no felony classification — all criminal matters are misdemeanor-level.

items.label: Disposition (Cordova)
items.description: Outcome of a law enforcement case in Cordova.

items.label: Fine or Bail Amount
items.description: Monetary amount of the fine imposed or bail set for the charge in Cordova Córdoba. Null if no financial penalty applies or bail is denied.

items.label: Disposition Date
items.description:
Date the disposition was recorded

---

items.label: Charge Filing Date
items.description: A date a charge was filed (NIEM j:ChargeFilingDate)

items.label: Quarantine Enforcement
items.description:
Special sub-cluster for public health quarantine orders. Used in the Contagion scenario.
Business Context: Links Law Enforcement to Healthcare domain through quarantine orders
Purpose: Document quarantine zone establishment and compliance monitoring
Parent Cluster: Incident Report

items.label: Issuing Authority
items.description: The authority that issued the quarantine order (e.g., "Provincial Health Authority, Aldara")

items.label: Quarantine Zone
items.description: Description of the geographic area under quarantine (e.g., "Porto Sereno Port District, Berths 1-12")

items.label: Compliance Status
items.description: Whether the quarantine is being complied with

items.label: Quarantine End Date
items.description:
Date the quarantine order was lifted. Null if still active.

---

items.label: Quarantine Start Date
items.description: Date the quarantine order took effect

subject.label: Involved Person
subject.description: Person involved in a law enforcement incident (suspect, victim, witness). W3C PROV-DM Agent (Person) with involvement classification.

provider.label: Reporting Officer
provider.description: The law enforcement officer who filed the incident report. W3C PROV-DM Agent (Person) with badge number as identifier.
